info.title: SkbKontur.TypeScript.ContractGenerator.Cli
info.description:
Copyright (C) 2026 SkbKontur.TypeScript.ContractGenerator.Cli
-d, --directory      Directory with CSharp code, if specified, Roslyn
generator is used instead of reflection
-a, --assembly       Required. Assembly to search for `ICustomTypeGenerator`
and `IRootTypesProvider` implementations.
-o, --outputDir      (Default: src) Generated files output directory.
--nullabilityMode    (Default: Pessimistic) Use correct linter disable comment
--lintMode           (Default: EsLint) Generated files language: JavaScript or
TypeScript.
--optionalProps      (Default: true) Enables optional properties.
--globalNullable     (Default: false) Enables global nullable
--watch              (Default: false) Watch assembly files and regenerate
TypeScript on changes
--help               Display this help screen.
--version            Display version information.
